description: You are a Systems Administrator migrating metric namespaces from a legacy hierarchy to a new infrastructure hierarchy in Graphite. At the filesystem level within the Graphite installation (/opt/graphite/), migrate the Whisper metric directories from servers/ to their new locations: move all ec2_instance_* directories to infrastructure/compute/ and the load_balancer directory to infrastructure/network/. Ensure the legacy directories are removed and the Graphite search index is updated to reflect the changes. In the Graphite Web UI (http://localhost/), create and save a dashboard named 'Namespace Migration Audit' featuring two graphs: 'Compute Tier' targeting the pattern infrastructure.compute.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*utilization and 'Network Tier' targeting the path infrastructure.network.load_balancer.requests.count.
